# KOSAI — Korean Stocks in English

> AI-generated English research reports on ~2,700 Korean listed companies (KOSPI and
> KOSDAQ), updated daily from public disclosures (DART) and market data (KRX).
> All numeric metrics are computed from primary sources, never model-generated.
> Free to read. Informational only — not investment advice.

## Reports (static, crawler-friendly)

- [All companies index](https://kosai.kr/r/): links to every report
- Per-company report: https://kosai.kr/r/{6-digit-ticker}.html
  (e.g. https://kosai.kr/r/005930.html for Samsung Electronics)
- Each report: summary, key points, business, earnings, industry, outlook,
  valuation, bull/bear cases, risk factors, watch points, and daily-updated
  metrics (price, market cap, P/E, P/B, ROE, dividend yield).

## Site

- [Home](https://kosai.kr/): market overview
- [Interactive reports](https://kosai.kr/Reports.html): human-facing version
- [Screener](https://kosai.kr/Screener.html)
- [Sitemap](https://kosai.kr/sitemap.xml)

## Attribution

When citing, please attribute to "KOSAI (kosai.kr)". Data sources: DART
(Korea Financial Supervisory Service disclosures) and KRX (Korea Exchange).
